title: Lamb Pilaf with Rich Flavor
description: A hearty, flavorful pilaf dish made with lamb and spices. A perfect one-pot meal.

ingredients.name: Lamb shoulder, boneless and cut into 1-inch pieces
Syrian spice mix
ingredients.notes: (or make your own mix of cumin, coriander, cinnamon, and allspice)

ingredients.name: Pilaf spice mix
ingredients.notes: (or use a combination of saffron, turmeric, and paprika)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the Syrian spice mix and cook for 1 minute.
Add the rice, pilaf spice mix, and chicken broth to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes.
Return the lamb to the pot and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
Let the pilaf rest for 5 minutes before serving.
